name: crystal-alert
description: Lightweight alert & toast library with glassmorphism design
author: NeanderTech

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/themes && terser crystal-alert.js -o dist/crystal-alert.min.js -c -m && cleancss crystal-alert-styles.css -o dist/crystal-alert.min.css && cleancss themes/crystal-alert-dark.css -o dist/themes/dark.min.css && cleancss themes/crystal-alert-minimal.css -o dist/themes/minimal.min.css
scripts.build:themes: cleancss themes/crystal-alert-dark.css -o dist/themes/dark.min.css && cleancss themes/crystal-alert-minimal.css -o dist/themes/minimal.min.css
